problem id: e266959e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  11001111 -> 10000110
  01110001 -> 01010011
  00000001 -> 01011111
  10100111 -> 10001111
  11000011 -> 00000111
  11001011 -> 00000110
  00010100 -> 01111101
  00100101 -> 11011011

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 11100110
